title: Stir Fry with Saudi Tomatoes
description: A simple and quick stir fry dish made with saudia tomatoes, perfect for a meal on the go.

ingredients.name: Tender
ingredients.notes: any color or type will do

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: vegetable or canola oil works well

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the tender and cook for 3-4 minutes, until slightly browned.
Add the Saudi tomatoes and cook for another 4-5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Serve hot, garnished with any additional herbs or spices if desired.
Clean up any mess you made in the kitchen!
Pat yourself on the back for a job well done!
